# aisw

> Structured documentation index for language models and retrieval systems.

Current version: 0.3.2

## aisw documentation

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/
Section: overview
Summary: aisw manages named profiles for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI. Switch between work, personal, and client accounts with one command on macOS, Linux, and Windows.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/index.md
Headings: Install | First run | Core workflow | Start here | Additional reference
Common queries: aisw docs | aisw install | claude code account manager | codex cli account switcher | gemini cli account switcher

## Quickstart

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/quickstart/
Section: getting-started
Summary: Install aisw, store your first profiles, and switch between Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI accounts in under five minutes.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md
Headings: 1. Install | 2. Bootstrap | 3. Add profiles | 4. Switch accounts | 5. Inspect state | 6. Maintain profiles | 7. Shell hook (optional but recommended) | Next steps
Common queries: install aisw | quickstart for Claude Code account switching | quickstart for Codex CLI account switching | quickstart for Gemini CLI account switching

## Commands

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/commands/
Section: reference
Summary: Complete syntax and flag reference for all aisw commands  -  add, use, list, status, remove, rename, backup, init, uninstall, shell-hook, and doctor.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/commands.md
Headings: Global flags | At a glance | `aisw init` | `aisw add` | `aisw use` | `aisw list` | `aisw status` | `aisw remove` | `aisw rename` | `aisw backup list` | `aisw backup restore` | `aisw uninstall` | `aisw shell-hook` | `aisw doctor` | Automation reference
Common queries: aisw command reference | aisw add use list status | aisw flags

## Automation and Scripting

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/automation/
Section: reference
Summary: Using aisw in CI pipelines, shell scripts, and non-interactive environments  -  flags, JSON output, exit codes, and common patterns.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/automation.md
Headings: Baseline flags | Non-interactive patterns | Machine-readable output | Useful JSON patterns | Output contract | Applying profiles without the shell hook | Concurrency | Common CI patterns | Set up a named profile in CI | Switch profile before a tool invocation | Verify active profile in a health check | Clean up after CI | Related
Common queries: aisw automation | aisw json output | aisw scripting | aisw CI non-interactive | aisw GitHub Actions

## Shell Integration

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/shell-integration/
Section: reference
Summary: Install and configure the aisw shell hook for bash, zsh, and fish. Understand what the hook does and how shell completions work.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/shell-integration.md
Headings: Install | Zsh | Bash | Fish | Verify | What the hook does | Remove | Shell completions | Installed locations | Manual install from source
Common queries: aisw shell hook | aisw zsh completion | aisw bash completion | aisw fish completion

## Adding Profiles

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/adding-profiles/
Section: reference
Summary: How to add and capture named profiles in aisw using API keys, OAuth, environment variables, and live credential import.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/adding-profiles.md
Headings: API key | From environment variable | Interactive OAuth | Capture current live credentials | Useful flags | Profile storage | Duplicate account detection | Related
Common queries: add second Claude Code account | add second Codex CLI account | add second Gemini CLI account | AI CLI OAuth profile manager | aisw add --from-live

## Supported Tools

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/supported-tools/
Section: reference
Summary: Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI support matrix  -  auth methods, credential locations, OS keyring support, and state mode behavior per platform.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/supported-tools.md
Headings: Binary detection | State mode | Credential storage by tool and platform | Claude Code | Codex CLI | Gemini CLI | Auth backend support matrix | References
Common queries: does aisw support Claude Code | does aisw support Codex CLI | does aisw support Gemini CLI | aisw macOS Linux Windows support

## Configuration

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/configuration/
Section: reference
Summary: aisw configuration file location, schema, field reference, directory layout, and AISW_HOME override.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/config.md
Headings: Location | Permissions | Schema | Field reference | Directory layout | Version compatibility
Common queries: aisw config.json | aisw configuration file | aisw AISW_HOME

## How It Works

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/how-it-works/
Section: reference
Summary: Profile model, atomic credential switching, OS keyring integration, and per-tool implementation details for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/how-it-works.md
Headings: Profile model | Atomic switching with rollback | Credential storage backends | OS keyring support | Per-tool implementation | Claude Code | Codex CLI | Gemini CLI | Identity deduplication | Token expiry warnings | Config locking | Backup behavior | What aisw does not do
Common queries: how does aisw switch accounts | aisw credential storage | aisw keyring integration | aisw atomic switching | aisw profile model

## Security

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/security/
Section: reference
Summary: How aisw stores and protects credentials  -  local-only storage, OS keyring integration, file permissions, transactional writes, and OAuth flow safety.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/security.md
Headings: Summary | Credential storage | What is stored and where | File permissions | OS keyring integration | No remote transmission | Switching safety | Transactional writes | Backups before destructive operations | Config locking | OAuth flows | Scope of access | Reporting a vulnerability
Common queries: aisw credential security | is aisw safe to use | aisw file permissions | aisw keychain security | aisw oauth safety

## Why aisw?

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/why-aisw/
Section: overview
Summary: Why aisw exists  -  the problems with manual credential switching across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI, and how named profiles solve them.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/why-aisw.md
Headings: The problem | What aisw does differently | What aisw does not do | Typical users | Design principles
Common queries: why use aisw | AI CLI account switching problem | Claude Code account manager | Codex CLI account switcher | Gemini CLI account switcher | multiple AI coding agent accounts

## Troubleshooting

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/troubleshooting/
Section: reference
Summary: Diagnosing and fixing common aisw failures  -  missing tools, hook problems, keyring issues, permission errors, and OAuth failures.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
Headings: Quick diagnostics | Tool reported as not installed | Shell hook not active | Live credentials do not match active profile | OAuth flow fails or times out | Keyring not available (Linux) | Permission errors | Backup restore did not switch the active profile | Non-interactive mode fails in CI | `aisw use gemini ... --state-mode shared` fails | Config lock timeout | Still blocked?
Common queries: aisw troubleshooting | aisw shell hook not working | aisw tool not found | aisw gemini oauth fail | aisw keyring not available
